---
name: Website or content update
about: Request an update to public project content
title: "[Content] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Page Or Repository

Link to the affected page, repository, or file.

## Requested Change

Describe the content that should be added, corrected, or removed.

## Reason

Explain why the change is needed.

## Source Or Evidence

Add the source, reference, approval, or context needed to verify the update.

Do not include patient-identifiable data, credentials, private datasets, or
confidential clinical material.
